stemHtml: Regulation (EU) No 376/2014 of the European Parliament and of the Council on the reporting, analysis and follow-up of occurrences in civil aviation specifies the rules on the...

options.a: issuance of Acceptable Means of Compliance and Guidance Material for investigation reports.
options.c: safety investigation into accidents and serious incidents in order to prevent future accidents and incidents.
options.d: occurrence reporting, analysis and dissemination of safety information.
